title: Infinite Parkour
description: Automatically generating, infinitely long parkour plugin.
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/5Tzv0FP.png)

![Gameplay](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdnFnZTZ5ZHdoZTNpenpoaTBwNm1pY3ZoMTAxM2o2amF3MzZ5eGJ4aSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/uPfb6DP6HVfgcZMvHp/giphy.gif)

Infinite Parkour is the most feature-rich randomly generating parkour plugin in the world.
With every jump, the distance and height are completely random.

The parkour has 6 different jump types:
- Normal jumps
- Ice jumps
- Slab jumps
- Fence jumps
- Glass pane jumps
- Schematics

Other important features include:
- Spectate other players
- Add your own translations
- Add your own schematics
- Many customization features for players
- Almost fully customizable
- MySQL support

Scroll down for the full list of features!
- Works on Purpur, Paper, and Spigot. **Paper** is highly recommended.
- This plugin supports **1.16 - 1.20.5**.
- Use **/parkour** to get more information when you join your server.

![https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Walk%20in%20the%20Park.svg](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Walk%20in%20the%20Park.svg)

![https://i.imgur.com/nHMUnXr.png](https://i.imgur.com/nHMUnXr.png)

This is not a completed list. Have fun exploring :)

- Easy to use and good-looking
- Lightweight
- Change everything - add your own items, languages, parkour styles, change the chances of specific types of jumps, add your own schematics, customize the scoreboard and so much more.
- Rewards - choose rewards that players will get at an interval, every time they reach a specific score or at a specific score only once.
- Jump variety - with 6 jump types it never gets boring.
- Styles - players can change the look of their parkour with custom styles
- Player settings - players can customize their playing experience with changing things in the menu, like the block lead, difficulty of schematics, etc.
- Spectate other players
- Leaderboards - easily view a leaderboard of all players' scores or create your own
- Over 15 PlaceholderAPI placeholders
- Holographic Displays support
- Multiverse support
- Vault support
- Bedrock support
- MySQL/local support - choose your storage type
- Command block support
- No-lag scoreboard
- Inventory recovery - use /ip recoverinventory to recover inventories if your server crashes.
- Has a Developer API
- Regular updates
- Quick support - usually <1 hour

![Videos](https://i.imgur.com/J45XKDw.png)
